code:
import io
import string
import list

fn main() -> Unit
  match io.read_line()
  when Some(line)
    let nums = parse_line(line)
    let sorted = insertion_sort(nums)
    print_list(sorted)
  when None
    println("")
  end
end

fn parse_line(_ line: String) -> List<Int>
  mut result: List<Int> = []
  mut token = ""
  mut i = 0
  let n = string.len(line)
  while i < n
    match string.byte_at(line, i)
    when Some(b)
      if b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 10 or b == 13
        if string.len(token) > 0
          match string.parse_int(token)
          when Some(v)
            result = list.push(result, v)
          when None
            ()
          end
          token = ""
        end
      else
        token = "#{token}#{string.from_byte(b)}"
      end
    when None
      ()
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  if string.len(token) > 0
    match string.parse_int(token)
    when Some(v)
      result = list.push(result, v)
    when None
      ()
    end
  end
  result
end

fn insertion_sort(_ xs: List<Int>) -> List<Int>
  mut result: List<Int> = []
  mut i = 0
  let n = xs.len()
  while i < n
    match xs.get(i)
    when Some(v)
      result = insert_sorted(result, v)
    when None
      ()
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  result
end

fn insert_sorted(_ xs: List<Int>, _ v: Int) -> List<Int>
  mut out: List<Int> = []
  mut inserted = false
  mut i = 0
  let n = xs.len()
  while i < n
    match xs.get(i)
    when Some(x)
      if not inserted and v <= x
        out = list.push(out, v)
        inserted = true
      end
      out = list.push(out, x)
    when None
      ()
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  if not inserted
    out = list.push(out, v)
  end
  out
end

fn print_list(_ xs: List<Int>) -> Unit
  mut s = ""
  mut i = 0
  let n = xs.len()
  while i < n
    match xs.get(i)
    when Some(v)
      if i == 0
        s = "#{v}"
      else
        s = "#{s} #{v}"
      end
    when None
      ()
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  println(s)
end
